violations.text: Raw animal foods (liquid eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (vegetables) in the prep unit #1. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Orange juice was observed held at 51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per interview with PIC, juice was opened less than 1 hour prior. Juice was moved to another cooler at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the grill and stove have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

The grease refuse outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (milkshake machine, slicer, and soft serve ice cream machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

Food was observed held at 46-47 degrees Fahrenheit in the dessert refrigerator . Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had been in the refrigerator since the day prior. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed held at 39 degrees Fahrenheit. Refrigerator was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Refrigerator must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

Food was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit in the dessert display case during time of inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, food had been in the display case since the day prior. Food was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). The ambient air temperature was observed at 41-47 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. The display case was taken out of service and must not be used until it can maintain an internal food temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below. Display case must be repaired/replaced/adjusted. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

Employees' medicines were not stored to prevent the contamination of food, equipment, or utensils. Employees' medicine was observed stored with food in the storage closet during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

Reduced oxygen packaged (ROP) seafood (lobster) was observed thawed with the package intact. ROP seafood must be removed from the package when thawing. Lobster was observed held at 34 degrees Fahrenheit during time of inspection. Lobster was removed from the package during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

Single-service articles (boxes) were observed stored on the floor in the storage room. Single-service articles must be stored at least 6 inches off the ground. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
The slicer blade was observed in poor repair (chipped). Slicer blade must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelves and slicer have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024

The floor in the ice cream window area and under equipment in the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2024
